place: Chaweng Noi, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Mediterranean-Moorish Sea-View Pool Villa Enclave - Chaweng Noi
blurb: A Mediterranean–Moorish enclave carried to a Koh Samui hillside above the sea — whitewashed walls, terracotta arches and cobalt zellige set among cypress, fountains and lantern-lit courtyards on the south-east coast at Chaweng Noi. Five residence types, from lagoon-front one-bedrooms to three-bedroom sea-view pool villas, all fully furnished, turnkey and under professional rental management. From ฿6,970,000, with a projected ~11-14% return.
detail:
WHERE MARRAKECH MEETS THE GULF OF SIAM
An intimate, low-density enclave on Koh Samui's south-east coast — bringing the soul of North Africa to Chaweng Noi, five minutes on foot from Chaweng Noi Beach.

Whitewashed walls and cool shade. Terracotta arches and cobalt zellige. Cypress, fountains, and the flicker of lanterns at dusk. A place designed to feel timeless rather than fashionable, with architecture that belongs to the hillside it's built on — and a full five-star resort with complete amenities at its heart. Completion Q4 2028.

THREE SETTINGS, ONE DESIGN LANGUAGE
The estate unfolds across three connected collections, all sharing the same Moorish design vocabulary.
The Laguna — at the water's edge, where a winding lagoon-pool threads through the lower estate to private terraces with direct lagoon frontage.
The Hillside — single-storey pool villas stepping up the slope, with garden, lagoon and resort-pool views.
The Hilltop — the highest, quietest ground, where pool villas turn toward the open sea for uninterrupted sunset views over the Gulf.

THE RESIDENCES
Five residence types span the three collections, each delivered fully furnished and turnkey:
Pre-sale pricing*
1-Bedroom Lagoon-Front — 55 m² + terrace — from ฿6,970,000*
2-Bedroom Lagoon-Front — 91 m² + terrace — from ฿7,905,000*
1-Bedroom Hillside Pool Villa — 78 m² + terrace — from ฿9,010,000*
2-Bedroom Hilltop Sea-View Pool Villa — 83 m² + terrace — from ฿11,900,000*
3-Bedroom Hilltop Sea-View Pool Villa — 110 m² + terrace — from ฿13,515,000*
*Pre-sale pricing valid until 31 July 2026 — a 15% discount to public-launch pricing, meaning early investors buy in at a lower base and capture a higher yield from day one.

BEAUTIFUL — AND BUILT TO PERFORM
Every residence is placed under professional resort management for genuinely hands-off ownership. Projected net returns of 11–14%, depending on unit type and position; on the developer's operating model, the signature two-bedroom hilltop villa targets around 14% net yield at roughly 76% occupancy.
Prefer full predictability? Opt into the guaranteed 8% return programme: hand your villa entirely to management and receive fixed passive income — no active involvement required.
Either way, you own dual value: a personal Samui home and a yield-generating asset.

KEY FACTS
Location: Chaweng Noi, Koh Samui — 5-minute walk to the beach
Full five-star resort with complete amenities
Professional rental management, hands-off ownership
Projected ROI 11–14% net, or guaranteed 8% programme
Guaranteed developer buy-back after 3 years
30-year renewable land lease · plots of 150 m²
Fully furnished, turnkey handover
Completion Q4 2028
Pre-sale pricing until 31 July 2026 (15% below public launch)
